The '''Sentry droid Mark I''' was a floating, spherical [[Droid/Legends|droid]] model equipped with a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]]. Others had flamethrowers and icebreakers, and were identical to [[G0-T0]]. G0-T0 used many of them as guards on his yacht, the ''[[Visionary]]''.

Their design was strikingly similar to the much later [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Interrogation droid/Legends|interrogation droids]], most notably [[IT-O interrogation droid/Legends|IT-O]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
